Case Studies

Real teams. Real results.

See how founders, agencies, and engineering teams use Mekong RaaS to scale operations without scaling headcount.

👨‍💻

Solo SaaS Founder

Pro — $99/mo

Indie Hacker

The Problem

Running 5 critical business functions alone — marketing, support, research, content, and finance — with no budget to hire.

The Solution

Used Mekong RaaS missions to automate content production, handle tier-1 support triage, conduct weekly competitor research, and generate financial summaries. All from a single terminal.

40h
Hours saved per week
3x
Revenue growth in 6 months
5
Business layers automated

“I went from working 70-hour weeks to 30. Mekong handles the operational grind while I focus on product. It's like having a full ops team in my terminal.”

— Daniel M., Indie SaaS Founder
Get Started
🎯

Marketing Agency

Agency — $199/mo

Content Studio

The Problem

Client content production was a bottleneck — 3 copywriters couldn't keep up with demand. New client pitches were missed. Team was burning out.

The Solution

Deployed mission templates for blog posts, SEO audits, social media calendars, and ad copy. Every client gets a standardized weekly content drop powered by RaaS missions — reviewed and shipped in hours, not days.

10x
Content output increase
5
New clients acquired
60%
Reduction in revision cycles

“We doubled our client roster without hiring a single new writer. The mission templates are so good our team just reviews and approves instead of creating from scratch.”

— Sarah K., Creative Director
Get Started
⚙️

Enterprise DevOps Team

Master — $399/mo

Tech Corp

The Problem

Manual code reviews were a bottleneck — senior engineers spent 30% of their time reviewing PRs instead of building. Documentation was always out of date.

The Solution

Integrated Mekong RaaS into the CI/CD pipeline. Every PR triggers automated code review missions that flag issues, suggest improvements, and generate inline docs. Test generation missions run nightly against new features.

60%
Faster release cycles
90%
Fewer production bugs
100%
API docs always current

“Senior engineers now spend their time on architecture, not PR review. The automated code review is frighteningly good — catches things humans miss.”

— James R., VP Engineering
